prophecies.q: 《认识主道》第一卷 —— 宇宙的结构
prophecies.a: 我看见一个巨大的、像蛋一样的物体，外面是明亮的火焰，火焰之下是一层黑暗的皮肤。在那火焰中有一个红色的燃烧球体，如此之大，以至于整个蛋状物体都被它照亮。在它上方，三颗星星按序排列，使那球体不因燃烧而坠落。
prophecies.q_en: Scivias, Book I — The Structure of the Universe
prophecies.a_en: I saw a great object, like an egg, surrounded by bright fire, beneath which was a dark skin. Within that fire was a red burning globe so great that the whole egg-shaped object was illuminated by it. Above it three stars were arranged in order, keeping the globe from falling by its burning.

prophecies.q: 《认识主道》第三卷 —— 教会腐败的预言
prophecies.a: 正义将从她的位子上被拉下，信仰将在世界的各个角落动摇。教士们将被剥夺尊严，他们将像没有牧人的羊群一样四散逃离。教会将被撕裂，因为这些人只追求世俗的财富而非灵魂的拯救。
prophecies.q_en: Scivias, Book III — Prophecy of Church Corruption
prophecies.a_en: Justice will be pulled from her seat, and faith will totter in every corner of the world. The clergy shall be stripped of their dignity and shall scatter like sheep without a shepherd. The Church shall be torn asunder, because these men pursue worldly riches rather than the salvation of souls.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 中世纪晚期教会确实经历了严重腐败，包括圣职买卖、教士世俗化等问题。1378年开始的西方教会大分裂（Great Schism）使教会分裂为多个教宗对立的阵营。但希尔德加德的描述是象征性的，难以精确对应某一具体时期。
prophecies.verdict_en: The late medieval Church did experience severe corruption, including simony and clerical worldliness. The Western Schism beginning in 1378 split the Church into rival papal factions. However, Hildegard's description is symbolic and difficult to map precisely to a specific period.

prophecies.q: 《认识主道》第三卷 —— 五个时代的兽
prophecies.a: 我看见五头兽，面向北方站立。第一头是火红的犬，但它不燃烧；第二头是黄色的狮子；第三头是淡色的马；第四头是黑色的猪；第五头是灰色的狼。它们各自代表着一个时代的暴虐统治。
prophecies.q_en: Scivias, Book III — The Five Beasts of the Ages
prophecies.a_en: I saw five beasts standing facing the north. The first was a fiery dog that did not burn; the second a yellow lion; the third a pale horse; the fourth a black pig; the fifth a grey wolf. Each represented the tyrannical rule of a different age.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 希尔德加德用五头兽象征教会历史中五个腐败的时代。天主教神学家将其解读为：火犬象征贪婪的教士，黄狮象征战争时期，淡马象征信仰冷淡，黑猪象征异端横行，灰狼象征末世混乱。这些象征与教会历史上不同危机时期有一定对应，但具体时代划分存在争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: Hildegard used five beasts to symbolize five ages of Church corruption. Catholic theologians interpret them as: the fiery dog symbolizing greedy clergy, the yellow lion representing wartime, the pale horse for tepid faith, the black pig for rampant heresy, and the grey wolf for end-times chaos. These symbols loosely correspond to various Church crises, but the exact periodization remains debated.

prophecies.q: 《认识主道》第三卷 —— 敌基督的降临
prophecies.a: 在最后的时代，撒旦之子将会降生。他将由一个被诅咒的女人所生，从幼年起就沉浸于所有邪恶的学问之中。他将声称自己是神，行出伪装的奇迹，欺骗许多人。但他的统治不会长久，因为至高者将亲自将他击倒。
prophecies.q_en: Scivias, Book III — The Coming of the Antichrist
prophecies.a_en: In the last age, the son of Satan shall be born. He shall be born of an accursed woman, steeped in all wicked arts from his youth. He shall claim to be God, perform false miracles, and deceive many. But his reign shall not last long, for the Most High shall strike him down.

prophecies.a: 教会将分裂为两个部分：一部分坚守真道，另一部分追随虚假的牧人。这种分裂将带来巨大的苦难和混乱，直到上帝亲自介入，恢复合一。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of the Great Church Schism
prophecies.a_en: The Church shall be split into two parts: one holding fast to the truth, the other following false shepherds. This division will bring great suffering and confusion, until God Himself intervenes to restore unity.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1054年东西方教会大分裂已经发生，此后1378-1417年的西方教会大分裂（阿维尼翁教廷对立罗马教廷）更为直接地对应此预言。两派各立教宗，教会陷入长达39年的混乱，直到康斯坦茨大公会议恢复统一。
prophecies.verdict_en: The East-West Schism of 1054 had already occurred. The Western Schism of 1378-1417 (Avignon papacy vs. Rome) more directly matches this prophecy. Rival popes led to 39 years of chaos, resolved only by the Council of Constance.

prophecies.q: 关于未来改革者的预言
prophecies.a: 在那些黑暗的日子之后，将兴起一位伟大的改革者。他将以上帝之剑斩断腐朽，使教会重获光辉。许多僧侣将回归贫穷与谦卑的道路，信仰将在那些曾经堕落的地方重新生根。
prophecies.a_en: After those dark days, a great reformer shall arise. He will cut away the rot with the sword of God and restore the Church to its glory. Many monks shall return to the path of poverty and humility, and faith shall take root again in places that had fallen.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 16世纪的天主教反宗教改革运动（特利腾大公会议，1545-1563）与此预言有一定对应。新成立的耶稣会等修会确实回归了贫穷与谦卑的精神。但也有学者认为此预言指向的改革尚未完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 16th-century Counter-Reformation (Council of Trent, 1545-1563) partly corresponds to this prophecy. Newly founded orders like the Jesuits did return to ideals of poverty and humility. However, some scholars argue the foretold reform has not yet fully materialized.

prophecies.q: 《神圣工程之书》—— 宇宙之轮的神视
prophecies.a: 我看见一个巨大的轮子，光芒四射。人被置于这轮子的中心，他的头触及天穹，他的脚踏于深渊。东、西、南、北四方的风围绕着他旋转。这是宇宙与人的合一——人是创造的中心与缩影。
prophecies.q_en: Liber Divinorum Operum — Vision of the Cosmic Wheel
prophecies.a_en: I saw a great wheel, radiating with light. Man was placed at the center of this wheel, his head touching the firmament, his feet upon the abyss. The winds of east, west, south, and north revolved around him. This is the unity of cosmos and man — man is the center and microcosm of creation.

prophecies.a: 地上的元素将陷入混乱。风将不按时节吹拂，雨将在不该落的时候降下，空气将变得不洁。因为人对大地犯了罪，大地也将向人索债。季节将错乱，庄稼将在错误的时候生长，或根本不再生长。
prophecies.a_en: The elements of the earth shall fall into disorder. Winds shall not blow in their proper seasons, rain shall fall at wrong times, and the air shall become impure. Because man has sinned against the earth, the earth shall demand its debt. Seasons shall become confused, crops shall grow at the wrong time, or not grow at all.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 现代气候变化导致的极端天气事件——季节异常、空气污染、农作物减产——与这段12世纪的预言存在显著的相似性。但希尔德加德的描述基于中世纪神学的罪与罚框架，与现代科学的因果解释不同。
prophecies.verdict_en: Modern climate change causing extreme weather events — seasonal anomalies, air pollution, crop failures — bears notable resemblance to this 12th-century prophecy. However, Hildegard's description operates within a medieval theological framework of sin and punishment, differing from modern scientific causation.

prophecies.q: 关于大战与和平的预言
prophecies.a: 在那个时代，国家将彼此攻伐，大地将被血染红。但在这场大战之后，一个和平的时代将降临。人们将放下武器，耕种他们的田地，正义将从废墟中升起。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of Great War and Peace
prophecies.a_en: In that age, nations shall attack one another, and the earth shall be stained red with blood. But after this great war, an age of peace shall descend. People shall lay down their weapons, till their fields, and justice shall rise from the ruins.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 两次世界大战（1914-1918，1939-1945）及此后相对和平的欧洲秩序可被视为部分对应。二战后欧洲确实经历了前所未有的长期和平，但全球层面的战争与冲突并未完全停止。
prophecies.verdict_en: The two World Wars (1914-1918, 1939-1945) and the subsequent relatively peaceful European order could be seen as partial correspondence. Post-WWII Europe has indeed experienced unprecedented lasting peace, though wars and conflicts have not ceased globally.

prophecies.a: 在最后的日子里，太阳将变暗，月亮将不再发光，星辰将从天空坠落。大地将剧烈震动，海洋将咆哮翻涌。那时，永恒的审判者将降临，活人与死人都将在祂面前受审。义人将被接入光明，恶人将被投入黑暗。
prophecies.a_en: In the last days, the sun shall grow dark, the moon shall give no light, and the stars shall fall from the sky. The earth shall quake violently, and the seas shall roar and surge. Then the Eternal Judge shall descend, and the living and the dead shall be judged before Him. The righteous shall be taken into the light, and the wicked cast into darkness.

prophecies.q: 《认识主道》第二卷 —— 灵魂与身体的关系
prophecies.a: 灵魂在身体中如同风在风琴管中：当风吹入管中，管子便发出声音。同样，灵魂使身体的各个肢体运动、感知，如同将生命之气注入泥土所造的器皿。没有灵魂，身体不过是尘土。
prophecies.q_en: Scivias, Book II — The Relationship of Soul and Body
prophecies.a_en: The soul in the body is like wind in organ pipes: when the wind blows through the pipes, they produce sound. Likewise, the soul moves and gives sensation to all the limbs of the body, as if breathing the breath of life into a vessel made of clay. Without the soul, the body is mere dust.

prophecies.q: 教会净化与复兴的预言
prophecies.a: 在最大的苦难之后，教会将经历一次彻底的净化。她将像被暴风雨冲刷过的百合花一样洁白。那时将出现一位圣洁的教宗，他将在废墟之上重建信仰的殿堂，使万民重新归向真理之路。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of Church Purification and Renewal
prophecies.a_en: After the greatest tribulations, the Church shall undergo a thorough purification. She shall be as white as a lily washed by the storm. Then a holy Pope shall appear, who will rebuild the temple of faith upon the ruins and guide all peoples back to the path of truth.

prophecies.q: 关于医学与自然疗法的预言
prophecies.a: 上帝将草药、石头与动物的力量赐予人类，使人得以治愈疾病。但在未来的时代，人们将遗忘这些自然的疗法，转而追求人造的药物。当他们重新发现自然的力量时，许多疾病将不药而愈。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy on Medicine and Natural Healing
prophecies.a_en: God has given humanity the powers of herbs, stones, and animals for the healing of diseases. But in future ages, people shall forget these natural remedies and pursue man-made medicines. When they rediscover the power of nature, many illnesses shall be healed without artificial drugs.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 现代社会确实长期以合成药物为主导。但20世纪末以来，草药医学和自然疗法（如中医药被WHO认可）出现显著复兴。2015年屠呦呦因从青蒿中提取青蒿素获诺贝尔奖，正是「重新发现自然的力量」的典型案例。
prophecies.verdict_en: Modern society has indeed been dominated by synthetic pharmaceuticals. However, since the late 20th century, herbal medicine and natural remedies have seen significant revival (e.g., WHO recognition of Traditional Chinese Medicine). Tu Youyou's 2015 Nobel Prize for extracting artemisinin from sweet wormwood is a prime example of 'rediscovering the power of nature'.

prophecies.a: 在未来的某个时代，女性将不再沉默。她们将在教会与世界中发出自己的声音，参与管理和教导。这并非违背上帝的秩序，而是恢复了上帝最初创造男女平等的旨意。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy on the Status of Women
prophecies.a_en: In a future age, women shall no longer be silent. They shall raise their voices in the Church and in the world, participating in governance and teaching. This is not against God's order, but a restoration of God's original intent in creating man and woman as equals.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪以来女性在社会各领域取得显著进步。天主教会中，女性虽仍不能担任神职，但在神学研究、教区管理等方面的参与度大幅提升。希尔德加德本人作为12世纪拥有巨大影响力的女性，本身就是这一预言的先驱实践者。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 20th century, women have made significant progress across all sectors of society. In the Catholic Church, while women still cannot be ordained, their participation in theological scholarship and parish administration has increased substantially. Hildegard herself, as a highly influential 12th-century woman, was a pioneering embodiment of this prophecy.

prophecies.q: 《生命的功业之书》—— 美德与恶行的对话
prophecies.a: 我看见一座高山，山上站着灵魂的三十五种美德，她们穿着光明的衣裳。山脚下是三十五种恶行，面目丑陋，各自与对应的美德争辩。谦卑对骄傲说：「你从天堂坠落，而我将人升往天堂。」
prophecies.q_en: Liber Vitae Meritorum — Dialogue of Virtues and Vices
prophecies.a_en: I saw a high mountain, upon which stood thirty-five virtues of the soul, clothed in garments of light. At the foot of the mountain were thirty-five vices, each ugly in appearance, debating with their corresponding virtue. Humility said to Pride: 'You fell from heaven, while I raise humanity to heaven.'

prophecies.q: 《神圣工程之书》—— 最终的和谐
prophecies.a: 在一切的终末，上帝将使万物更新。天与地将被净化，死亡将不再存在。被造物将回到最初的和谐——如同我在神视中所见，那个燃烧的宇宙之蛋最终将化为永恒的光芒，人将永远居住在那光中。
prophecies.q_en: Liber Divinorum Operum — The Ultimate Harmony
prophecies.a_en: At the end of all things, God shall make all things new. Heaven and earth shall be purified, and death shall exist no more. Creation shall return to its original harmony — as I saw in my vision, the burning cosmic egg shall at last become eternal light, and humanity shall dwell in that light forever.
